skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Resuscitate
skills.description: Improves evasion and reduces stamina depletion when afflicted with abnormal status effects.

levels.description: While active, greatly improves evasion invulnerability time and reduces stamina depletion.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Reduces the duration of stun by 60%.
Reduces the duration of stun by 90%.

skills.name: Item Prolonger
skills.description: Extends the duration of some item effects.

skills.name: Thunder Attack
skills.description: Increases thunder element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Special Ammo Boost
skills.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons.
